name: Kp Check Cashing AKA V Check Cashing
description_short: KP Check Cashing (V Check Cashing) is a Denver-based check cashing service located on W 38th Ave offering check cashing, money orders, and related financial services.
description_long:
KP Check Cashing, also known as V Check Cashing, operates a physical storefront in Denver, Colorado at 1343 W 38th Ave. The company has been listed in local financial services directories and maintains regular business hours throughout the week. As a check cashing service, the company provides basic financial transaction services to the Denver metropolitan area.

The company offers check cashing as its primary service, with the directory listing indicating it may accept various types of loans and financial products. According to their WeLoans profile, they position themselves as accepting "all kinds of loans" and claim to work with customers regardless of credit status. The business operates with extended hours, open Friday through Thursday with varying schedules (10 AM–7:30 PM on Fridays, 9 AM–6:30 PM on Saturdays, 10 AM–6:30 PM Monday through Thursday), and closed Sundays.

What distinguishes KP Check Cashing from competitors is limited information—the WeLoans directory listing provides basic operational details but minimal marketing differentiation. The company can be contacted directly at +1 303-455-2145 for specific service inquiries. They are positioned among nearby Denver loan services including ACE Cash Express and Beacon Lending, suggesting they serve a similar customer base seeking quick financial transactions.

This is a small, local check cashing operation with basic service offerings. The directory listing itself contains minimal detail about fees, specific services, or unique value propositions. Consumer should contact the business directly to confirm current services, pricing, and terms before visiting, as directory information may not reflect all offerings or recent changes to operations.
pros: Extended hours including Saturday service (9 AM–6:30 PM) for customer convenience
Physical location in accessible Denver neighborhood with phone support at +1 303-455-2145
States willingness to work with customers with bad credit
Open Monday through Saturday providing multiple access days per week
Located in central Denver area with multiple nearby alternative financial services for comparison shopping
cons: Minimal transparency on the directory listing—no fee schedule, check cashing rates, or service charges disclosed
No website or direct online presence mentioned; limited information available online for research
Ambiguous business model—listing claims they 'may accept all kinds of loans' but core service is check cashing, creating confusion about actual offerings
No customer reviews or ratings provided in the directory listing
Vague contact procedures ('fill in contact form on their site') with no clear online booking or service transparency
best_for: Denver residents needing immediate check cashing services without bank account access
Customers seeking in-person check cashing with multiple weekly operating hours
Individuals with limited credit history or lower credit scores open to alternative financial services
diagnosis: KP Check Cashing is best for Denver-area residents who need basic check cashing services during extended business hours. The main caveat is that the company has minimal online presence and transparent information—consumers should call (+1 303-455-2145) directly to confirm current services, fee structures, and actual loan offerings before visiting, as the directory listing suggests possible loan referral arrangements that lack clarity.
services: Bill payment services (implied from check-cashing category)
Loan referral services (implied from directory listing claims)
Payday loan referrals (mentioned in WeLoans integration)
Installment loan referrals (mentioned in WeLoans integration)
Title loan referrals (mentioned in WeLoans integration)
